commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ba959f1933376d44d180a1bcc83fb2f5f15e528c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves the summarized assistant reply immediately before a kept pre-compaction user message, reanchors replay to that assistant, and extends the successor-transcript tests.

PR surface: Source +69, Tests +47. Total +116 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The existing bug is source-reproducible from current main because summarized messages are removed while session replay starts at firstKeptEntryId; the PR-introduced branch-compaction risk is also visible from source inspection, though I did not run a live channel repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor should address the branch-compaction reanchor finding and add real behavior proof; there is no safe close or automatable merge path in the current state.

target.title: fix(compaction): preserve assistant boundary replies
target.body:
## Summary
- preserve the summarized assistant reply immediately before a surviving pre-compaction user message when writing successor transcripts
- move the successor compaction replay boundary to that preserved assistant so agent context stays `summary -> assistant -> user` instead of hiding the reply
- strip stale thinking signatures from preserved boundary assistants along with other pre-compaction kept messages

Fixes #76729

## Tests
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-successor-transcript.test.ts
- git diff --check
target.author: leno23
